inputs.fcf_source: Standalone reference only: FY2025 OCF $4.306B less capex $5.929B = negative owner cash; normalized $0.45/sh uses adj. EBITDA less maintenance capex [Assumption]; not stance gate while merger pending
inputs.adjusted_ebitda_source: FY2025 segment Adjusted EBITDA sum $2,890M (Renewables $932M, Utilities $863M, Energy Infrastructure $1,130M, New Energy Technologies $(35)M) per 10-K FY2025
inputs.merger_buyer: GIP + EQT Infrastructure VI (Horizon Parent, L.P.)
inputs.normalization_note: March 1, 2026 merger agreement at $15.00 cash supersedes standalone Lawrence path for stance gate. J.P. Morgan fairness range $11.31 to $16.39/sh (DEF 14A proxy materials, June 2026).

bear.notes: Regulatory delay past June 2027 outside date; spread widens; partial deal risk

base.notes: Merger closes late 2026 or early 2027 per 8-K 2026-03-02; $15.00 cash consideration

sotp_build.notes: Merger closes late 2026 or early 2027 per 8-K 2026-03-02; $15.00 cash consideration

bull.notes: Accelerated regulatory approvals; close by year-end 2026

standalone_reference.notes: Informational only while take-private pending; heavy growth capex keeps reported FCF negative

merger_close.notes: Primary event path; no go-shop period identified in merger agreement

deal_break.notes: Bear sensitivity: buyer termination or regulatory failure; parent termination fee up to ~$588M [Assumption on equity impact]

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Regulated utility rate base and project finance on balance sheet; no land-at-zero pattern

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: 12.0 GW contracted renewables backlog not yet operating (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: New Energy Technologies SBU Adjusted EBITDA $(35)M FY2025

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF?
option_scan.evidence: 4.0 GW new renewables contracts signed in 2025; backlog 12.0 GW with signed PPAs

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Fluence Energy stake marked via public FLNC; Uplight/Maximo private tech investments per 10-K

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: March 1, 2026 GIP/EQT cash merger at $15.00/sh; expected close late 2026 / early 2027

option_scan.question: Embedded option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: AES Ohio 2.1 GW data-center load growth and 310 MW retail supply contracts (424B5 March 2025)

stance_proposal.override_reason: Merger arb base return near but below ~15% bar; regulatory timeline and spread compression keep watch until clearer entry or deal certainty

growth_explanation.years_1_5: Standalone: renewables backlog conversion and AES Ohio data-center load; merger event supersedes for stance.
growth_explanation.years_6_10: Standalone: regulated utility rate-base growth at AES Indiana/AES Ohio.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 backlog and segment EBITDA; 424B5 March 2025 strategic highlights

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map standalone platform cash, renewables backlog option, merger-close catalyst uplift to $15.00, and regulatory execution reserve once each; parent recourse debt is embedded in platform capitalization, not double-counted.

components.label: Contracted renewables and utility platform (standalone floor)

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AES/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0000874761_26_000063.htm: FY2025 Adjusted EBITDA $2890.0M, OCF $4306.0M, capex $5929.0M, recourse debt $6000.0B, cash $1382.0M; merger $15.0/sh per AES/investor-documents/sec-edgar/8-K_20260302_rpt20260301_acc0001193125_26_084157.htm; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K, Q1 2026 10-Q, and merger 8-K before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 segment Adjusted EBITDA (Renewables + Utilities + Energy Infrastructure + New Energy Technologies)

source.locator: Recourse Debt: total recourse debt was $6.0 billion at December 31, 2025

assumptions.label: Normalized owner cash per share (Adjusted EBITDA proxy)
assumptions.rationale: Segment Adjusted EBITDA per share anchors standalone contracted-platform cash while merger is pending; recourse debt burden informs capitalization multiple, not a separate additive claim.

assumptions.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash capitalization multiple (standalone floor)
assumptions.rationale: Bear uses JPM fairness low context (~$11.31/sh); base ties to fairness floor; bull modest standalone re-rate below $15 merger consideration.

calculations.label: Contracted platform owner cash per share

components.label: 12 GW contracted backlog and data-center load option

source.locator: 12.0 GW contracted backlog with signed PPAs at December 31, 2025

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted incremental value of 12 GW backlog and AES Ohio data-center load option
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on contracted backlog conversion and data-center load not fully captured in near-term Adjusted EBITDA multiple; probability and timing discounted.

components.label: GIP/EQT cash merger completion uplift to $15.00

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AES/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0000874761_26_000063.htm: FY2025 Adjusted EBITDA $2890.0M, OCF $4306.0M, capex $5929.0M, recourse debt $6000.0B, cash $1382.0M; merger $15.0/sh per AES/investor-documents/sec-edgar/8-K_20260302_rpt20260301_acc0001193125_26_084157.htm; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K, Q1 2026 10-Q, and merger 8-K before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: Agreed cash merger consideration per share

source.locator: Each share converted into the right to receive $15.00 in cash without interest

inputs.label: J.P. Morgan fairness opinion low reference (context)

source.locator: Fairness opinion reference range $11.31 to $16.39 per share (proxy materials)

assumptions.label: Incremental merger-close uplift above standalone platform plus backlog
assumptions.rationale: Base equals $15.00 consideration less platform $11.31 and backlog $1.00; low case haircuts close probability and timing; high case assumes faster close with wider spread capture.

driver_model.timing_basis: Expected close late 2026 or early 2027 per merger 8-K.

components.label: Regulatory delay and spread compression reserve

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AES/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0000874761_26_000063.htm: FY2025 Adjusted EBITDA $2890.0M, OCF $4306.0M, capex $5929.0M, recourse debt $6000.0B, cash $1382.0M; merger $15.0/sh per AES/investor-documents/sec-edgar/8-K_20260302_rpt20260301_acc0001193125_26_084157.htm; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K, Q1 2026 10-Q, and merger 8-K before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: Regulatory delay, spread compression, and execution friction reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for PUCO/FERC/CFIUS delay, outside-date risk, and arb spread at current price versus $15.00 consideration; does not duplicate deal-break standalone repricing in platform floor.

calculations.label: Regulatory and execution reserve per share

components.label: Parent recourse debt net of cash (embedded in platform multiple)

valuation.evidence: Parent recourse debt $6000.0B less cash $1382.0M (~$6.48/sh); embedded in platform capitalization multiple.
valuation.assumption_summary: Phase 3 provisional range pending filing-grounded proof.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K, Q1 2026 10-Q, and merger 8-K before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Contracted renewables and utility platform (standalone floor)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.
